allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from duckduckgo_search import DDGS; print\([m for m in dir\(DDGS\) if 'text' in m.lower\(\) or 'async' in m.lower\(\)]\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from ddgs import DDGS; d = DDGS\(\); print\([m for m in dir\(d\) if not m.startswith\('_'\)]\)")
